title: maytenus peduncularis
intro: Maytenus peduncularis, also known as Schinus peduncularis or Mayten, is a plant species native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Maytenus peduncularis include its potential to help manage pain, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Maytenus peduncularis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
